title: Flyconid
move_pattern: Starts with Frail Spores or Smash. Then randomly cycles between Vulnerable Spores (50% chance), Frail Spores (33% chance), and Smash (17% chance), never repeating the same move consecutively.
notes: Flyconid uses a weighted random selection between three moves. The initial move favors Frail Spores, while subsequent moves are selected from all three options with fixed weights. Vulnerable Spores is the most likely follow-up move at 50% chance.
